{# --------------------------- Make logo absolute (prevents broken image links) --------------------------- #} {% set base_url = frappe.utils.get_url() %} {% set logo = frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "company_logo") %} {% if logo and not (logo.startswith("http://") or logo.startswith("https://")) %} {% set logo = base_url + logo %} {% endif %} {# --------------------------- Totals and Grouping --------------------------- #} {% set ns = namespace(taxable_sum=0, tax_sum=0) %} {% set grp = namespace(rows={}) %} {% for item in doc.items %} {% set taxable = (item.net_amount if item.net_amount is not none else (item.amount or 0)) %} {% set tax_rate = (item.custom_sales_tax_rate or 0) %} {% set tax_amt = (item.custom_sales_tax or 0) %} {% set ns.taxable_sum = ns.taxable_sum + (taxable or 0) %} {% set ns.tax_sum = ns.tax_sum + (tax_amt or 0) %} {% set key = "{:,.2f}".format(tax_rate) %} {% if key not in grp.rows %} {% set _ = grp.rows.update({ key: {"taxable": 0, "tax": 0} }) %} {% endif %} {% set _ = grp.rows[key].update({ "taxable": grp.rows[key]["taxable"] + (taxable or 0), "tax": grp.rows[key]["tax"] + (tax_amt or 0) }) %} {% endfor %} {# --------------------------- QR + Barcode (PDF-safe embedded) Tune module_width/height/dpi here if needed --------------------------- #} {% set qr_data_uri = "" %} {% set bc_data_uri = "" %} {% if doc.custom_fbr_invoice_no %} {% set payload = frappe.call( "fbr_integration.print_barcodes.get_qr_and_barcode_data_uri", value=doc.custom_fbr_invoice_no, include_fbr_url=1, fbr_base_url="https://fbr.gov.pk/verify", module_width=0.32, module_height=16.0, dpi=203 ) %} {% if payload %} {% set qr_data_uri = payload.get("qr") or "" %} {% set bc_data_uri = payload.get("barcode") or "" %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
{% set logo = frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "company_logo") %} {% if logo and not frappe.db.exists("File", {"file_url": logo}) %} {% set logo = "" %} {% endif %} {% if logo %} {% endif %}
{{ doc.company }}
TRN: {{ doc.company_tax_id }}
Invoice Date: {{ doc.posting_date }}
Due Date: {{ doc.due_date }}
P.O.#: {{ doc.po_no or "" }}

TAX INVOICE

Invoice No: {{ doc.name }}
FBR Invoice No: {{ doc.custom_fbr_invoice_no or "" }}
Balance Due:

# Item Qty Rate Taxable Tax % Tax Total
{{ loop.index }} {{ item.item_name }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.qty or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(item.rate or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(taxable or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(tax_rate) }}% {{ "{:,.2f}".format(tax_amt) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(line_total) }}

{# ============================================================ TOTALS FROM ITEM CUSTOM FIELDS ============================================================ #} {% set ns = namespace(taxable_sum=0, tax_sum=0, rate_sum=0, rate_count=0) %} {% for item in doc.items %} {% set taxable = (item.net_amount if item.net_amount is not none else (item.amount or 0)) %} {% set item_tax = (item.custom_sales_tax or 0) %} {% set item_rate = (item.custom_sales_tax_rate or 0) %} {% set ns.taxable_sum = ns.taxable_sum + (taxable or 0) %} {% set ns.tax_sum = ns.tax_sum + (item_tax or 0) %} {% if item_rate and item_rate > 0 %} {% set ns.rate_sum = ns.rate_sum + item_rate %} {% set ns.rate_count = ns.rate_count + 1 %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% set avg_tax_rate = (ns.rate_sum / ns.rate_count) if ns.rate_count > 0 else 0 %} {# ============================================================ QR + BARCODE AS DATA URI (PDF SAFE) NOTE: NO "your_app" USED HERE ============================================================ #} {% set qr_data_uri = "" %} {% set bc_data_uri = "" %} {% if doc.custom_fbr_invoice_no %} {% set payload = frappe.call("fbr_integration.print_barcodes.get_qr_and_barcode_data_uri", value=doc.custom_fbr_invoice_no) %} {% if payload %} {% set qr_data_uri = payload.get("qr") or "" %} {% set bc_data_uri = payload.get("barcode") or "" %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
